issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttack' not 'Activated'. Card text explicitly says '[When Attacking]'.
Duration should be 'UntilStartOfNextTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. Card text says 'until the start of your next turn' which is a longer duration than end-of-turn.
Action type should be 'TrashFromBoard' or similar board-based trash, not 'TrashFromHand'. Card says 'trash 1 of your {FILM} type Characters' (board characters), not hand cards.
Second action needs explicit duration 'EndOfTurn' to match 'at the end of this turn'. Currently missing duration specification.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [DON!! x1] [When Attacking] This Character gains +1000 power until the start of your next turn. Then, trash 1 of your {FILM} type Characters at the end of this turn.
